case_title: SANDRA L. HERZSTEIN VS. ADAM CLARK et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERZSTEIN, SANDRA L. SERVED MAY-23-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CLARK, ADAM
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF HERZSTEIN, SANDRA L. AS TO DEFENDANT CLARK, ADAM DOES 1 TO 10
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CLARK, ADAM

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERZSTEIN, SANDRA L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLARK, ADAM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFENDANT VACATED PREMISES ON JUNE 18, 2012. $19,237.50 RENT, $1,925.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $515.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $21,677.50, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERZSTEIN, SANDRA L. AS TO DEFENDANT CLARK, ADAM DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $515.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CLARK, ADAM
